pi_items.source: Verified via verifier.py, which explicitly reads the file from this path using copy_from_env().
Verified via task instructions and verifier logic. The coordinates in the base dataset (survey_points.csv) map to Colorado only when interpreted as UTM Zone 13.
Verified via explicit task instructions to set Hemisferio (Hemisphere) to Norte (North).
Verified via verifier.py logic, which enforces this minimum point threshold for data integrity scoring.

Verified via verifier.py logic and by running PyProj on the base dataset (survey_points.csv). The dataset's bounds (E: 474495 to 482772, N: 4394400 to 4399600) strictly fall within this lat/lon bounding box when transformed using UTM Zone 13N.

privileged_info_summary: I discovered a critical defect: both 'setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' are entirely missing from the task directory. Because setup_task.ps1 is missing, the required input file 'colorado_site_survey.csv' is never generated in the environment. Furthermore, because export_result.ps1 is missing, task_result.json is never created, causing the verifier.py script to fail unconditionally. Although the verifier logic does strictly expect the KML output path (C:/Users/Docker/Documents/site_export.kml) and verifies the UTM Zone 13N bounding box projection parameters, the task itself is programmatically broken and unscorable.
